observed_strengths: PromptVault can score prompt quality and report improvement deltas.
The scan response already supports bounded previews so UI and CLI automation do not need full prompt bodies.
The UI already shows prompt quality pills and selected-prompt suggestions.
observed_weaknesses: Bounded previews were latest-first only, so weak prompts could be absent from the visible repair queue.
The UI had no mode to prioritize the lowest-quality prompts after a scan.
The CLI had no stable option to request a weakest-first preview sort.

selected_candidate.name: weak-first preview triage
selected_candidate.reason: Make the repair queue operational by letting users and agents load weakest prompts first without changing full-scan stats or Markdown export behavior.
selected_candidate.success_metric: A bounded no-export scan with --weakest-first returns preview_sort=quality_asc, five returned prompts, markdown_written=false, and output_path=null.
